name: Apple-Cranberry Pie with Brown Sugar Topping
recipeIngredient: 9-inch pie pastry for a single crust
Cranberries (1 cup), rinsed and picked over
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pie: Spray a 9-inch pie pan with nonstick cooking spray. Place the pastry shell in the pan.
2. Peel, core, and thinly slice the apples. Toss with lemon juice. Combine with cranberries, flour, sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Pile into the pastry shell.
3. Prepare the topping: In a bowl, mix brown sugar, flour, softened butter, and cinnamon until forming large crumbs. Sprinkle over the pie filling.
4. Place the pie on a baking sheet and bake in a preheated 350°F (175°C) oven for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden and apples are tender. Allow to cool on a rack before serving with sweetened whipped cream or ice cream.
Data per serving: Calories 337, Protein 2g, Fat 11g, Carbohydrates 60g, Sodium 182mg, Saturated fat 4g, Monounsaturated fat 4g, Polyunsaturated fat 2g, Cholesterol 8mg.
